releases.title: RISC-V GNU Tools 2025.08.08 + HTIF + PK
commands: mkdir -p $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//riscv32-unknown-elf-ubuntu-20.04-rv32gc_ilp32d && ./build-riscv-tools.sh --compress --force --setup gcc htif pk --docker philippvk/riscv-tools:ubuntu-20.04 --dest $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//riscv32-unknown-elf-ubuntu-20.04-rv32gc_ilp32d SHARED_CCACHE_DIR=$(pwd)/.ccache GNU_REF=2025.08.08 HTIF_URL=https://github.com/PhilippvK/libgloss-htif.git HTIF_REF=multilib_fix ARCH=rv32gc ABI=ilp32d DEDUP=true && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//riscv32-unknown-elf-ubuntu-20.04-rv32gc_ilp32d/gnu.tar.xz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//riscv32-unknown-elf-ubuntu-20.04-rv32gc_ilp32d_dedup.tar.xz && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//riscv32-unknown-elf-ubuntu-20.04-rv32gc_ilp32d/htif.tar.xz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//htif-rv32gc_ilp32d_dedup.tar.xz && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//riscv32-unknown-elf-ubuntu-20.04-rv32gc_ilp32d/pk.tar.xz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/gnu_2025.08.08_min//pk-rv32gc_ilp32d_dedup.tar.xz
